title: Python (pre-commit framework)
description: Conventional commits + pre-commit-framework commit-msg hook via alessandrojcm/commitlint-pre-commit-hook. Requires Node (for commitlint) and Python (for pre-commit).

files.content:
repos:
  - repo: https://github.com/alessandrojcm/commitlint-pre-commit-hook
    rev: v9.18.0
    hooks:
      - id: commitlint
        stages: [commit-msg]
        additional_dependencies: ['@commitlint/config-conventional']
